category.scope_note: Air-source heat pumps and split-system air conditioners exported from China to Colombia

title.en: China-to-Colombia Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入哥伦比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入哥倫比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese air-source heat pump documentation against Colombia's mandatory RETIE electrical safety regulation, RETIQ energy labelling regulation, UPME PROURE energy efficiency programme, MADS refrigerant controls under the HCFC phasedown schedule, and ICONTEC NTC standards harmonised with IEC, including the critical 60 Hz / 127-220 V grid incompatibility for Chinese 50 Hz heat pumps.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与哥伦比亚强制性RETIE电气安全法规、RETIQ能效标签法规、UPME PROURE能效计划、MADS在HCFC削减时间表下的制冷剂管控以及ICONTEC与IEC协调的NTC标准的差距对照，包括中国50 Hz热泵在哥伦比亚60 Hz / 127-220 V电网下的关键频率不兼容问题。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與哥倫比亞強制性RETIE電氣安全法規、RETIQ能效標籤法規、UPME PROURE能效計畫、MADS在HCFC削減時間表下的製冷劑管控以及ICONTEC與IEC協調的NTC標準的差距對照，包括中國50 Hz熱泵在哥倫比亞60 Hz / 127-220 V電網下的關鍵頻率不相容問題。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited conformity assessment body decision, RETIE compliance determination, RETIQ labelling approval, MADS refrigerant permit, ONAC laboratory accreditation ruling, customs determination, installation approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, distributors, and installers should verify current RETIE scope, RETIQ rating methodology, UPME efficiency thresholds, MADS ODS permit requirements, ONAC-accredited laboratory lists, ANE radio obligations, and Colombian grid frequency and voltage requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可符合性评定机构决定、RETIE合规判定、RETIQ标签批准、MADS制冷剂许可、ONAC实验室认可裁定、海关裁定、安装批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、经销商和安装方在出货、销售或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行RETIE适用范围、RETIQ评级方法、UPME能效门槛、MADS ODS许可要求、ONAC认可实验室名单、ANE无线电义务及哥伦比亚电网频率和电压要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可符合性評定機構決定、RETIE合規判定、RETIQ標籤批准、MADS製冷劑許可、ONAC實驗室認可裁定、海關裁定、安裝批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、經銷商和安裝方在出貨、銷售或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行RETIE適用範圍、RETIQ評級方法、UPME能效門檻、MADS ODS許可要求、ONAC認可實驗室名單、ANE無線電義務及哥倫比亞電網頻率和電壓要求。

answer_first.en: RETIE mandatory electrical safety compliance (ONAC-accredited lab certificate required; CCC not recognised), RETIQ mandatory energy labelling, 60 Hz grid incompatibility for Chinese 50 Hz compressors (redesign required), and MADS refrigerant controls for HCFC phasedown are the major Colombia compliance gaps for Chinese air-source heat pumps.
answer_first.zh: RETIE强制电气安全合规（须ONAC认可实验室证书；CCC不被认可）、RETIQ强制能效标签、中国50 Hz压缩机与哥伦比亚60 Hz电网不兼容（须重新设计）以及MADS在HCFC削减下的制冷剂管控，是中国空气源热泵进入哥伦比亚的主要合规差距。
answer_first.zht: RETIE強制電氣安全合規（須ONAC認可實驗室證書；CCC不被認可）、RETIQ強制能效標籤、中國50 Hz壓縮機與哥倫比亞60 Hz電網不相容（須重新設計）以及MADS在HCFC削減下的製冷劑管控，是中國空氣源熱泵進入哥倫比亞的主要合規差距。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly or upon RETIE/RETIQ/MADS regulatory update
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true. Source must be official Colombian regulator, ICONTEC, or primary legal source.
